englishDefinitions: Movies in the U.S. film-rating system that are restricted to viewers age 17 and older unless accompanied by an adult.
Films that may contain strong language, violence, or sexual content.
persianTranslation: فیلم‌هایی که برای زیر ۱۷ سال مناسب نیستند
examples: R-rated movies are not allowed for younger kids without an adult.
The guide explains which scenes make the film R-rated.
